proof:
by
  rewrite [denum_def]
  let f : Nat → ↑{n : Int | even n} := fun n => ⟨2 * fnz n, ⟨fnz n, rfl⟩⟩
  exact ⟨f, fun n1 n2 h => by
    have h1 : (f n1).val = (f n2).val := congrArg Subtype.val h
    simp [f] at h1
    exact fnz_one_one n1 n2 (by linarith),
    fun ⟨m, k, hk⟩ => ⟨fzn k, Subtype.ext (by
      simp [f]
      have : fnz (fzn k) = k := by
        have := congr_fun fnz_fzn k
        simp [Function.comp, id] at this
        exact this
      linarith)⟩⟩
successful_attempts:
by
  rewrite [denum_def]
  let f : Nat → ↑{n : Int | even n} := fun n => ⟨2 * fnz n, ⟨fnz n, rfl⟩⟩
  exact ⟨f, fun n1 n2 h => by
    have h1 : (f n1).val = (f n2).val := congrArg Subtype.val h
    simp [f] at h1
    exact fnz_one_one n1 n2 (by linarith),
    fun ⟨m, k, hk⟩ => ⟨fzn k, Subtype.ext (by
      simp [f]
      have : fnz (fzn k) = k := by
        have := congr_fun fnz_fzn k
        simp [Function.comp, id] at this
        exact this
      linarith)⟩⟩
